title: Factorial Factory Core
description: Core mod of the Factorial Factory modpack series.
body:
# **NOT MAINTAINED, WILL NOT UPDATE.** ![CurseForge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3.2.0/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)![Available on Forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3.2.0/assets/cozy/supported/forge_vector.svg) ![Discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3.2.0/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_vector.svg) # **Factorial Factory Core, or FFC for short.**
Spoiler (Formerly known as Factory Automated Core [FAC])
#### This mod is made with MCreator ### _**1.16.5 version requires Forge 36.2.17 or later**_
Spoiler This mod introduces: - ~~Wooden Furnace a custom furnace for making things (Currently a WIP, may get removed)~~, - The Blaizer entity with a full armor set and the rod, dust, core, tools. - The White Topaz gem resource with a full armor set, tools. (NEW)
#### _**Factorial Factory Core is free to use in any modpacks, without permission.**_ ### ~~This mod has way more to offer in the future~~
